description: Fix stale stateSchemaVersion value in the MCP server health endpoint documentation example.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Update stateSchemaVersion in health endpoint example from 1 to 4
userStories.description: As a developer reading the MCP server docs, I want the health endpoint example to show the correct stateSchemaVersion value so that I can trust the documentation.
acceptanceCriteria: The health endpoint JSON example in docs/content/docs/reference/mcp-server.mdx shows `"stateSchemaVersion": 4` instead of `"stateSchemaVersion": 1`
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes: Single-line fix. In docs/content/docs/reference/mcp-server.mdx at line 170, change `"stateSchemaVersion": 1` to `"stateSchemaVersion": 4`. The source of truth is platform/mcp-server/src/state.ts line 324: `export const STATE_SCHEMA_VERSION = 4;`. The value is used in platform/mcp-server/src/http-routes.ts line 311 in the /health endpoint response.
